user.title: EV and Battery Charger
user.description: Calculates charging duration, planned charging start, and planned charging end for an EV, plug-in hybrid, or battery storage system. The current charge entity and optional calendar can now be selected directly. The target state of charge is provided as a dedicated number entity by the integration.

data.name: Name
data.target_source_priority: Which target time should be used first?

data_description.name: Example: Cupra Leon or home battery
data_description.soc_sensor: Select the entity that provides the current state of charge in percent, for example sensor.garage_homeassistant_batterie.
data_description.target_soc: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.
data_description.target_time: The vehicle should be ready every day at this time.
data_description.target_source_priority: Choose which target time has priority: the next calendar event or the configured daily overnight time.
data_description.efficiency: Charging efficiency as a factor, for example 0.93 for 93%.
data_description.buffer_minutes: The planned charging end is this many minutes before the ready time. Default: 30 minutes.
data_description.calendar_entity: Optional: select a calendar.* entity. If a next event is available, its start time can be used as the ready time.
data_description.ziel_ladestand: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.
data_description.Ziel-Ladestand: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EV and Battery Charger
reconfigure.description: Adjust the existing configuration. The integration will be reloaded automatically afterwards.

data.name: Name
data.target_source_priority: Which target time should be used first?

data_description.name: Example: Cupra Leon or home battery
data_description.soc_sensor: Select the entity that provides the current state of charge in percent, for example sensor.garage_homeassistant_batterie.
data_description.target_soc: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.
data_description.target_time: The vehicle should be ready every day at this time.
data_description.target_source_priority: Choose which target time has priority: the next calendar event or the configured daily overnight time.
data_description.efficiency: Charging efficiency as a factor, for example 0.93 for 93%.
data_description.buffer_minutes: The planned charging end is this many minutes before the ready time. Default: 30 minutes.
data_description.calendar_entity: Optional: select a calendar.* entity. If a next event is available, its start time can be used as the ready time.
data_description.ziel_ladestand: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.
data_description.Ziel-Ladestand: Initial value for the new “Target state of charge” entity. Later, you can change the target directly through this entity.

error.invalid_time: Please enter the time as HH:MM or HH:MM:SS, for example 06:00.
error.must_be_positive: The value must be greater than 0.
error.invalid_efficiency: Charging efficiency must be greater than 0 and no more than 1, for example 0.93.
error.must_not_be_negative: The value must not be negative.
error.invalid_calendar_entity: Please enter a valid calendar entity, for example calendar.cupra_charging, or leave the field empty.
error.invalid_target_source_priority: Please choose Calendar event first or Daily overnight time first.
error.invalid_target_soc: The target state of charge must be between 0 and 100%.

abort.unknown_entry: The existing configuration was not found.

init.title: EV and Battery Charger options
init.description: Adjust the entities, optional calendar, priority, and charging parameters for the charging plan.
